text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Takamatsunomiya Kinen. It'll be our
first race since we changed up Nishino Flower's
training method.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wake up rather early and head out to the track. I
have a hunch of who I might find there, and sure
enough, when I arrive...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Trainer?! What are you doing here?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I suspected, Nishino Flower has come out
here to try and shake off her pre-race anxiety.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ahaha. You saw right through me. I guess I am a little nervous...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm excited as well—really, I am. But...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm just a scaredy-cat at heart... Even though I'm
growing on the outside, I still feel like a little kid
on the inside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't feel right to tell her not to force herself
to change, or that she's fine just the way she is.
Instead, what I really want to tell her is...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: C-cool? Me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not only did she skip grades, she's been running
the best she can even though everyone else is
older. Even now, she's working hard to overcome
her obstacles.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm... I'm cool! Me! Cool!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I feel full of courage now! You're so good
at cheering people up, Trainer! ♪
choice_data_list: Let's go show the world the new Flower!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Okay!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha! My body feels light as air!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready to Bakushin at my very best! Speed is
power, and power is speed!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
You're certainly in great form. I can see lightning
flashing inside you...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Your brilliance shines all the brighter on sprints.
But I have no intention of giving up the lead.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Not to you... nor to the adorable flower.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying I'm faster than light? Thanks!
Let's do our best today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All right, Zephyr, let's do some cheers! Yelling out
loud is perfect for loosening up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Time to Bakushiiin!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Bakushin.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone's so fired up... But I guess they would
be. They've put in so much effort.)

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: But so have I!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: ...Flower. The direction of your wind has changed.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: The direction of my wind? Oh! Yes, it has!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I'm a new me today! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: I see. So that's what happened.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see how far upon the wind the
flower's scent will travel.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm excited too!
